goal: Conduct a rigorous forensic audit of the v10 microstructure overlay result to confirm, downgrade, or reject it as a genuine improvement over the immutable baseline.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes.
Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify the baseline.
All comparisons must use the same lockbox window for base and overlay.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate runs — never aggregated into a single story.
Leakage, reference, window, and snapshot audits must complete before any interpretive conclusion.
Simple rule-based overlay must be validated before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Freeze and forensic-cycle setup
slices.hypothesis: Lock v11 into audit-only mode, create the audit project, register all open forensic items.
slices.objective: Lock v11 into audit-only mode, create the audit project, register all open forensic items.
success_criteria: Separate v11 audit-project exists with frozen audit-only mode.
All 10 forensic open-items registered in the research map.
evidence_requirements: Separate v11 audit-project exists with frozen audit-only mode.
All 10 forensic open-items registered in the research map.

slices.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
slices.hypothesis: Reproduce the full v10 result from clean state without manual adjustments to determine if it is reproducible at all.
slices.objective: Reproduce the full v10 result from clean state without manual adjustments to determine if it is reproducible at all.
success_criteria: Reproduction verdict: reproduced exactly / partially reproduced / not reproduced.
evidence_requirements: Reproduction verdict: reproduced exactly / partially reproduced / not reproduced.

slices.title: Reference integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Resolve the core contradiction: v10 lockbox table referenced @3 as baseline while the plan specified immutable @1.
slices.objective: Resolve the core contradiction: v10 lockbox table referenced @3 as baseline while the plan specified immutable @1.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: @1 == @3, or @1 != @3 with documented diffs.
If mismatch: all prior v10 comparisons flagged as invalid.
evidence_requirements: Clear verdict: @1 == @3, or @1 != @3 with documented diffs.
If mismatch: all prior v10 comparisons flagged as invalid.
